description: Verso: Legal document in Arabic script. Concerning sale of a property or a dispute related to it. Mentions the benefactor's daughter, the clause "during his lifetime and after his death", and a Qāḍī "[al-]Qāḍī al-A[jall]" towards the end.  Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
